testcase.name: Frontend API wrapper tests > healthCheck success
Frontend API wrapper tests > runAgent success
Frontend API wrapper tests > runAgent includes auth tokens in payload
Frontend API wrapper tests > runAgent sends correct LLM provider
Frontend API wrapper tests > runAgent throws on non-ok response
App component > renders without crashing
App component > Authentication > shows "Logged out" status by default
App component > Authentication > shows Login button when not logged in
App component > Authentication > shows "Logged in" and username after successful login check
App component > Authentication > shows Logout button once logged in
App component > Project Management > shows "New Project" button
App component > Project Management > disables "New Project" button when not logged in
App component > Project Management > shows "Project idle" status in the sidebar footer by default
App component > Project Management > shows project connection hint when no project is connected
App component > Project Management > shows project list heading when logged in
App component > Chat Interface > shows the empty state message initially
App component > Chat Interface > has a chat input with correct placeholder
App component > Chat Interface > disables the Send button when input is empty
App component > Chat Interface > enables the Send button when input has text
App component > Chat Interface > sends a message and displays user + assistant messages
App component > Chat Interface > clears the input after sending
App component > Chat Interface > clears all messages when Clear chat is clicked
App component > Settings > opens settings sidebar when cogwheel is clicked
App component > Settings > closes settings sidebar when close button is clicked
App component > Settings > toggles dark mode and updates document attribute
App component > Settings > persists font size to localStorage when changed
App component > Settings > toggles show timestamps and persists to localStorage
App component > Settings > changes LLM provider and persists to localStorage
App component > Settings > changes theme via the select and persists to localStorage
App component > Tutorial > displays the tutorial overlay on first render
App component > Tutorial > advances to the next tutorial step when Next is clicked
App component > Tutorial > dismisses the tutorial when Skip Tutorial is clicked
App component > Tutorial > shows Finish on the last tutorial step and dismisses on click
App component > Error Handling > displays an error message when runAgentStream rejects
App component > Error Handling > re-enables Send button after an error
App component > Accessibility Settings > toggles reduce motion attribute on document
App component > Accessibility Settings > toggles high contrast attribute on document
App component > Accessibility Settings > toggles auto scroll and persists to localStorage
App component > Accessibility Settings > changes message density and persists to localStorage
importGeneratedAudio tests > uploads blob and mutates document correctly
